summary: 265 environmental parameters mapped across 7 ESRS-aligned categories and 29 subcategories. Each parameter is tagged with the industry standards that require it (ESRS E1-E5, IFRS S2, GRI 300s, GHG Protocol, SASB, CDP, TCFD, TNFD, SBTi, EU Taxonomy) and the capture method we can automate it through (SCADA, Digital Twin, AI Document Ingestion, ERP integration, manual).

scada.label: SCADA / IoT Evidence
scada.desc: Real-time operational evidence from PLCs, flow meters, energy meters, emissions monitors, leak detectors, quality probes, and site systems

twin.label: Digital Twin Computation
twin.desc: Computed metrics, scenarios, mass-energy balances, emission factors, operational simulations, and target pathway modelling

ai_doc.label: AI Compliance Ingestion
ai_doc.desc: OCR + LLM extraction from permits, policies, certificates, supplier PCFs, contracts, utility bills, lab reports, EPDs, board packs, and audit files

erp.label: Enterprise System Integration
erp.desc: Direct pull from SAP, Oracle, HRIS, procurement, finance, maintenance, risk, governance, and compliance systems

manual.label: Consultant Review / Surveys
manual.desc: Structured review for assumptions, stakeholder input, qualitative attestations, third-party assessments, exceptions, and sign-off

categories.name: Climate Change (GHG Emissions)
categories.standard_anchor: ESRS E1 · IFRS S2 · GRI 305 · GHG Protocol · CDP Climate · TCFD · SBTi
categories.description: End-to-end GHG inventory across Scope 1, 2, 3 — the core of any climate disclosure. Aligned to the GHG Protocol Corporate Standard, Scope 2 Guidance, and Scope 3 Standard (15 categories + proposed Category 16 facilitated emissions).

subcategories.name: Scope 1 — Direct Emissions
subcategories.description: Emissions from sources owned or controlled by the company.

parameters.name: Stationary combustion — Natural gas
parameters.desc: Boiler/furnace consumption × NG emission factor; SCADA gas flow meters + utility bills + SAP MM purchase orders.

parameters.name: Stationary combustion — Diesel (gensets)
parameters.desc: Genset hour meters + tank level sensors + diesel delivery invoices.

parameters.name: Stationary combustion — Fuel oil
parameters.desc: Tank gauge telemetry + fuel oil deliveries.

parameters.name: Stationary combustion — LPG / Propane
parameters.desc: Cylinder/bulk delivery invoices via AI ingestion.

parameters.name: Stationary combustion — Coal
parameters.desc: Coal yard scale + boiler feed rate + supplier invoices.

parameters.name: Stationary combustion — Biomass (biogenic CO2)
parameters.desc: Reported separately per GHGP; biogenic carbon disclosure under ESRS E1-6.

parameters.name: Stationary combustion — Hydrogen (grey/blue/green)
parameters.desc: H2 source attestation drives upstream Scope 3 split.

parameters.name: Stationary combustion — Syngas / Refinery gas
parameters.desc: Process gas composition from gas chromatograph + flow.

parameters.name: Stationary combustion — Waste-derived fuels
parameters.desc: RDF / sludge with variable emission factor.

parameters.name: Flaring emissions
parameters.desc: Flare gas flow + composition + combustion efficiency (digital twin).

parameters.name: Venting CO2
parameters.desc: Vent flow + composition; sweetening units, separators.

parameters.name: Mobile combustion — On-road fleet (diesel)
parameters.desc: Telematics fuel-burn + fuel card data + SAP fleet module.

parameters.name: Mobile combustion — On-road fleet (gasoline)
parameters.desc: Fuel card aggregation via AI ingestion.

parameters.name: Mobile combustion — Off-road equipment
parameters.desc: Forklifts, loaders, generators — hour meters + fuel issues.

parameters.name: Mobile combustion — Marine vessels
parameters.desc: Bunker delivery notes + flowmeters; IMO DCS.

parameters.name: Mobile combustion — Aircraft (corporate)
parameters.desc: Flight log + fuel uplift via expense system.

parameters.name: Process emissions — Cement (calcination)
parameters.desc: Raw meal feed × CaO content × stoich factor; twin balance.

parameters.name: Process emissions — Steel (BF/BOF, DRI)
parameters.desc: Coke/coal consumption + DRI reductant + carbon balance.

parameters.name: Process emissions — Ammonia / Fertilizer
parameters.desc: Reformer feed + purge CO2 from urea synthesis.

parameters.name: Fugitive — HFC refrigerants (R-410A, R-134a, etc.)
parameters.desc: BMS refrigerant leak detection + service records + procurement (kg recharged × GWP).

parameters.name: Fugitive — SF6 (electrical switchgear)
parameters.desc: Nameplate × leak rate; or kg top-up from service logs.

parameters.name: Fugitive — Methane (oil & gas LDAR)
parameters.desc: Continuous methane monitors + OGI + component counts; OGMP Level 4/5.

parameters.name: Fugitive — Methane (landfill / wastewater)
parameters.desc: LFG flow + composition; first-order decay model.

parameters.name: Land use change — Deforestation emissions
parameters.desc: Concession boundaries + satellite forest loss × C-stock.

subcategories.name: Scope 2 — Energy Indirect
subcategories.description: Emissions from generation of purchased electricity, steam, heat, cooling.

parameters.name: Purchased electricity — Location-based
parameters.desc: Sub-meters + utility bills + grid average EF.

parameters.name: Purchased cooling
parameters.desc: Chilled water BTU meter + supplier EF.

parameters.name: Renewable electricity share (consumed)
parameters.desc: Per Scope 2 Quality Criteria — bundled EACs/PPAs.

parameters.name: PPA / VPPA volumes
parameters.desc: Contract docs + invoices via AI ingestion.

subcategories.name: Scope 3 — Value Chain (15 Categories)
subcategories.description: Per GHG Protocol Scope 3 Standard. Category 15 limited to investments per 2025 revision; proposed Category 16 covers facilitated/insured emissions.

parameters.name: Cat 1 — Purchased goods & services (spend-based)
parameters.desc: SAP MM/Oracle Procurement spend × EEIO factors.

parameters.name: Cat 1 — Supplier PCFs ingested
parameters.desc: Supplier EPDs / PCFs ingested via AI.

parameters.name: Cat 1 — Primary data share
parameters.desc: Quality metric: actual supplier data vs proxies.

parameters.name: Cat 2 — Capital goods
parameters.desc: Capex spend × EEIO; SAP AA asset register.

parameters.name: Cat 3 — Fuel & energy-related (upstream)
parameters.desc: WTT factors applied to S1/S2 fuels + T&D losses.

parameters.name: Cat 5 — Waste generated in operations
parameters.desc: Weighbridge + waste manifests + disposal route EF.

parameters.name: Cat 6 — Business travel (air, rail, hotel, road)
parameters.desc: TMC feeds + expense reports + DEFRA EFs.

parameters.name: Cat 7 — Employee commuting
parameters.desc: Survey + HR address data + modal EF.

parameters.name: Cat 8 — Upstream leased assets
parameters.desc: Lessor utility data; operational vs equity boundary.

parameters.name: Cat 11 — Use of sold products (direct)
parameters.desc: Product energy spec × lifetime × use intensity.

parameters.name: Cat 12 — End-of-life treatment of sold products
Cat 15 — Investments (financed emissions, PCAF)
parameters.desc: PCAF asset class methodologies; attribution factors.

subcategories.name: Targets, Transition Plan & Internal Carbon
subcategories.description: Forward-looking climate metrics aligned with ESRS E1-1 to E1-4, IFRS S2, SBTi.

parameters.name: Net-zero target year (Scope 1+2)
parameters.desc: Extracted from strategy docs / board approval.

parameters.name: EU Taxonomy CapEx alignment — Climate Mitigation
EU Taxonomy OpEx alignment — Climate Mitigation
Executive remuneration linked to climate KPIs

subcategories.name: Physical & Transition Risk
subcategories.description: Climate Resilience & Adaptation — TCFD/IFRS S2/ESRS E1-9 risk metrics.

parameters.name: Assets in heat stress / wet-bulb hazard zones
Business continuity downtime — climate
parameters.desc: SCADA outage logs tied to weather events.

categories.name: Pollution (Air, Water, Soil, Substances)
categories.description: Pollutants emitted to air, water and soil; substances of very high concern; secondary microplastics (new under ESRS E2 2025).

parameters.name: Heavy metals to air (Hg, Pb, Cd, As)
Substances of Very High Concern (REACH SVHC)
Secondary microplastics released (new ESRS E2 2025)
parameters.desc: Tyre wear, textile fibres, paint, pellet loss.

categories.name: Water & Marine Resources
categories.standard_anchor: ESRS E3 · GRI 303 · CDP Water · SASB · CEO Water Mandate
categories.description: Water stewardship — withdrawal, consumption, discharge, stress exposure, quality.

parameters.name: Withdrawal in high baseline water stress (>40%)
Water efficiency improvement vs base year
% of sites with water risk assessment

categories.name: Biodiversity & Ecosystems
categories.standard_anchor: ESRS E4 · GRI 304 · TNFD (LEAP) · SBTN · CDP Forests
categories.description: Nature-related impacts, dependencies, risks and opportunities. Aligned with TNFD's LEAP approach: Locate-Evaluate-Assess-Prepare.

parameters.name: Sites in or near KBAs / protected areas
Sites in priority biomes (forest, mangrove, peatland, coral)
Sites with high freshwater ecosystem sensitivity
Revenue at risk from nature degradation

categories.name: Resource Use & Circular Economy
categories.standard_anchor: ESRS E5 · GRI 301 / 306 · Ellen MacArthur · WBCSD CTI
categories.description: Material inflows, outflows, products & services for circularity. Aligned with WBCSD Circular Transition Indicators (CTI) v4.

parameters.name: Critical raw materials used (EU CRM list)
Waste to disposal — Incineration w/ energy
Waste to disposal — Incineration w/o energy

categories.name: Energy Management
categories.description: Energy consumption, intensity, and renewable share — distinct from Scope 2 emissions accounting.

categories.name: Environmental Management & Governance
categories.standard_anchor: GRI 2-27 · ISO 14001 · ESRS E1-E5 governance · TCFD/IFRS S2 Governance
categories.description: Cross-cutting governance, management systems, certifications, expenditures.
